name: Light Armor
description: -1 to final DEF result. No protection bonus.

name: Medium Armor
description: No special properties. The standard issue.

name: Heavy Armor
description: +1 to final DEF result. Bulky but protective.

name: Carbine
description: +1 ATK when Engaged in Tight Space. -1 ATK when Engaged in Open Space.

name: Assault Rifle
description: No special properties. The reliable workhorse.

name: Marksman Rifle
description: +1 ATK when Engaged in Exposed Cover. -1 ATK when Engaged in Dense Cover.

name: Utility Kit
description: Smokes, flares, flashbangs. Active (1 Ammo each): Smoke: +1 Mobility this Exchange. Flashbang (Tight spaces): Flanking ATK benefit. Flare (Outdoors): +2-4 ATK, all Flanked Troopers Mobility Check or Injury.

name: LMG
description: Passive: +1 DEF for a Trooper receiving Covering Fire from this weapon.

name: HMG
description: Active (1 Ammo): Covering Fire for up to 3 Troopers. Passive: +1 ATK when Fortified.

name: Sniper Rifle
description: Passive: +1 ATK when Fortified. Additional +1 ATK when Fortified and didn't Move last Exchange.

name: Grenade Launcher
description: Active (1 Ammo each): Hit a Hard Target directly, or grant another Trooper the Flanking benefit next Offense Roll.

name: Melee Weapon
description: Passive: When Moving Up to Flanking, can move to Flanked instead - grants +3 ATK.

name: Rocket Launcher
description: Active: +3 ATK, or deal 2 Hits to a Hard Target. Single use.

name: Plasma Rifle
description: Active (no Ammo): Roll 1d6. 1: +2 Injury + destroyed. 2-3: +1 Injury, +1 ATK. 4-5: +2 ATK or 1 Hit. 6: +3 ATK or 2 Hits.

name: Demolition Charges
description: Place when cleared, or at GAINING GROUND+ during Engagement. Requires 2 Exchanges.

name: Jump Pack
description: Once per Engagement: instantly shift to any Offensive/Defensive position of choice.

name: Drone Gear
description: +1 to each Advance Roll. Does not stack with multiple Drone Gear.

name: Medic Gear
description: Patch Wounded Troopers back to OK when out of combat.

name: Radio Gear
description: Once per Mission: call artillery strike, hits in 1d2 Exchanges. +2 Momentum, Hard Targets destroyed. All Troopers Mobility Check or 1d3 Injury.

name: Supply Backpack
description: Holds 6 extra Ammo for redistribution outside of combat.

name: Environmental Gear
description: Withstand dangerous environments or traverse hazardous terrain. One set equips 2 Troopers.
